steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Oac Sourcearn Policy · Theory Oac Sourcearn Policy
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 1173 during a regional recovery and budget exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate an OAC origin with exact distribution, ownership, and KMS policy; retain keyboard and screen-reader progress, cancellation, error, and recovery evidence; then abort during a stream or multipart promise and prove every task and part reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Oac Sourcearn Policy contract for the supplied data.
